examples.title: Pseudocode: Blockchain Basics
examples.code:
BLOCKCHAIN Initialize
INPUT: genesis block
OUTPUT: blockchain

BEGIN
 blockchain = [genesis block]
 WHILE new blocks are generated
 add new block to blockchain
 END WHILE
 RETURN blockchain
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of the blockchain basics
